pet_notes: cute pixel-art full-body little girl, long black hair, black beret with small light accent, warm gentle smile, cream striped dress with tied waist, soft curious personality, compact readable desktop pet silhouette
style_notes: adorable 16-bit pixel sprite style, crisp pixel edges, chibi proportions, transparent-ready chroma background, no text, no scenery
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `pixel`: Pixel-art-adjacent digital mascot with a chunky silhouette, simple dark outline, limited palette, flat cel shading, and visible stepped edges. User style notes: adorable 16-bit pixel sprite style, crisp pixel edges, chibi proportions, transparent-ready chroma background, no text, no scenery.
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
